title: dysoxylum papillosum
intro: Dysoxylum papillosum, also known as the Philippine pyinkado or Philippine dysoxylum, is a species of tree in the family Meliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum papillosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy in Southeast Asian folk medicine. Dysoxylum papillosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
